nasb.text: Behold, the storm of the Lord has gone forth in wrath, Even a whirling tempest; It will swirl down on the head of the wicked.

esv.text: Behold, the storm of the Lord! Wrath has gone forth, a whirling tempest; it will burst upon the head of the wicked.

cnv.text: 看哪！耶和華的旋風， 在震怒中發出， 是旋轉的狂風， 必捲到惡人的頭上。

ccb.text: 看啊，耶和华的怒气像暴风一样袭来， 像旋风一样吹到恶人头上。
